name: Caribbean Beef Salad (Creamy Chutney Dressing)
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup chopped Major Grey's Mango Chutney
1 pound deli roast beef, cut into 1/4-inch slices
1 large mango, peeled, cut into 3/4-inch cubes
1 red bell pepper, cut into 3/4-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the yogurt, sour cream, chutney, vinegar, lemon juice, allspice, and pepper.
2. Trim the fat from the roast beef. Stack the beef slices and cut lengthwise in half and then crosswise into 1/2-inch-wide strips.
3. Place the lettuce on a serving platter. Arrange the beef, mango, and bell pepper on top of the lettuce.
4. Drizzle 1/2 cup dressing over the salad and pass the remaining dressing separately.
5. Serves 4 to 6
